issues.description: The RodoSessionSummary schema uses 'attended' (boolean) but the 'status' field is listed as required without being defined in properties. Minor schema inconsistency in existing code, not introduced by this feature.

summary: OpenAPI contract properly defines all 3 pipeline endpoints (trigger, get run, resume) with correct HTTP methods, operationIds, tags, and request/response schemas. All schemas (TriggerPipelineRequest, ResumePipelineRequest, TriggerPipelineResponse, PipelineRunResponse, StepResultResponse, BriefOutputResponse, BriefSourceResponse, CoverageWindowResponse) are well-structured with appropriate required fields, enums, and type constraints. Uses the existing ErrorResponse for error cases. Code generation produces a valid PipelineApi interface and project compiles successfully.
